provenance.calibration: Weekly against CEA monthly totals (CO2 Baseline Database v18.0)
provenance.accuracy_note: Hourly values are reconstructed, not metered. Expect ±3% error on national aggregates, ±6% on state-level, and higher variance on small-fuel off-peak hours (hydro 00:00–05:00 IST, gas overnight). For metered station-hourly values use the NPP DGR2 feed at https://npp.gov.in or the CEA monthly generation reports.
